get.summary: Get app config list with paging and filters
Get app config detail by ID
Get category list with filtering and paging
get.description:
Returns a paged list of categories with optional filters:
- keyword: Search in name, name_en
- groupId: Filter by group
- parentId: Filter by parent category
Ordered by SortOrder, then Id.

post.description: Creates a new category and returns its ID.

get.summary: Get category detail by ID
get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific category.

put.description: Updates an existing category by ID.

delete.description: Soft deletes a category by ID (sets IsDeleted to true).

get.summary: Get content page list with filtering and paging
get.description: Returns a paged list of content pages with optional filters.

post.description: Creates a new content page with Code and Language combination. Both must be unique together.

get.summary: Get content page detail by ID
get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific content page.

put.description: Updates an existing content page by ID. Code and Language cannot be changed.

delete.description: Soft deletes a content page by ID (sets IsDeleted to true).
